name: Roast & Toast Cafe
description: Popular downtown cafe serving espresso drinks, fresh-baked pastries, and hearty breakfast and lunch fare. A Petoskey staple since 1990.

name: City Park Grill
description: Historic restaurant and bar housed in one of Michigan's oldest operating taverns. Known for craft cocktails, steaks, and a lively atmosphere. Hemingway reportedly drank here.

name: Grandpa Shorter's
description: Iconic Up North gift shop selling Petoskey stones, Michigan-themed souvenirs, fudge, and local artisan goods. A must-visit for tourists since 1946.

name: Stafford's Perry Hotel
description: Grand Victorian-era hotel overlooking Little Traverse Bay, built in 1899. Features fine dining at the Noggin Room and Rose Room, plus stunning sunset views from the veranda.

name: McLean & Eakin Booksellers
description: Independent bookstore in the heart of the Gaslight District offering a carefully curated selection of books, frequent author events, and knowledgeable staff recommendations.

name: American Spoon
description: Specialty food store featuring preserves, salsas, and pantry goods made from locally foraged and Michigan-grown fruits. Founded by Justin Rashid in 1982.

name: The Spa at Boyne Mountain
description: Full-service resort spa with cedar sauna, steam room, indoor/outdoor heated pool, whirlpool hot tub, massage, facials, body treatments, and salon services. Day passes available.
address: 1 Boyne Mountain Rd, Boyne Falls, MI 49713

name: The Spa at Inn at Bay Harbor
description: Named Michigan's 'Most Gorgeous Spa.' Full range of massage, body treatments, facials, and nail services. Outdoor pool and hot tub available for lodging guests. 24/7 fitness center.
address: 3600 Village Harbor Dr, Bay Harbor, MI 49770

name: Willoway Spa and Wellness
description: Northern Michigan's premiere spa and fitness center offering infrared sauna, massage, facials, body work, and fitness classes. Focused on natural, non-toxic wellness products.
